segments.speaker: 题目6/7
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I saw the new painting exhibition in the art museum. Have you moving to my new apartment? Has taken up all of my free time recently. There's so much packing and unpacking to do. How's the exhithere's? A good variety of paintings, and their arrangement is really creative. I just wish it featured some stuff from artists in our area. We have so many talented painters here whose work is worth seeing, but all in all, it's quite awesome. I'll go check it out this weekend before it closes. I should be all moved in by then.
